title: ranunculus medians
intro: Ranunculus medians, also known as Butcher's Broom or Ruscus aculeatus, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing swelling and pain, improving circulation, and aiding in digestion. Butcher's Broom is often prepared as a tea or a tincture, and it can also be used in herbal capsules or ointments for topical application.
